steps.title: Identify which nouns require possessive forms
steps.content: The passage names “Racetrack Playa” (singular) and describes “162 rocks” (plural). The sentence must form two possessions: the sediment of the playa and the migration of the rocks.

steps.title: Match singular and plural possessive forms
steps.content: Singular nouns form the possessive with 's; plural nouns with s' (apostrophe only). C correctly pairs playa's (singular) with rocks' (plural). B omits the possessive on “rocks,” and D incorrectly uses plural form “playas'” for the one playa. That matches choice C — C is correct.
